summary: Iteration 11 - Breakfast (food) + Wine/Cocktails (bars) seeds and Bars activity-tag icon. Backend 12/12 pytest passed: /api/restaurants total 55 (29 food + 8 drinks + 18 bars); breakfast returns Sunrise Diner (sponsored, first) + The Morning Table (both category=food, cuisine=Breakfast); Wine returns The Wine Cellar (sponsored, category=bars, google/doordash/order urls); Cocktails returns Shaker & Spoon; bars w/o cuisine returns 18 items covering all 18 bar chips with sponsored-first ordering and google/doordash/order urls; food/drinks isolated from bars; /cuisines, /spin (POST), /reports, /places/photo(404), invalid zip 422 all OK. Frontend verified: FOOD shows cuisine-filter-breakfast chip; BARS shows cuisine-filter-wine and cuisine-filter-cocktails chips; Wine spin -> spin-result-card 'The Wine Cellar' + Cocktails spin -> 'Shaker & Spoon' + Breakfast spin -> 'Sunrise Diner' all with DoorDash/Order/Reviews/Suggest-removal buttons; nearby bar cards render activity-tag-{id} (icon+label), while FOOD & DRINKS nearby cards do NOT show activity-tag; Add-spot dialog Food options include Breakfast, Bars options include Wine and Cocktails.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx (~470 lines) still bundles Home/ShufflingDeck/RevealStage — consider splitting into files for maintainability.

AddRestaurantDialog now has BAR_IMAGES (good), but its CUISINES list still differs from Home.jsx FOOD_CUISINES (dialog has French/Steakhouse/Burgers which are not selectable as filter chips; Home has Pizza/BBQ/Greek/American/Mediterranean/Seafood not in dialog). Consider centralizing cuisine lists.
BAR_ICONS map in RestaurantCard falls back to Trophy for any unknown bar cuisine; explicit mapping for all 18 chips would be safer.
Category validator duplicated in RestaurantCreate + PlacesSearchRequest; refactor to shared enum.
seed_data_creation: One POST /api/reports doc (restaurant_id=TEST_iter11) created for regression assertion. No restaurant docs added.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seed totals: 55 = 29 food + 8 drinks + 18 bars. New seeds: Sunrise Diner (sponsored) + The Morning Table under Breakfast/food; The Wine Cellar (sponsored) under Wine/bars; Shaker & Spoon under Cocktails/bars. Activity-tag renders ONLY when r.category==='bars' via BAR_ICONS map in RestaurantCard.jsx (data-testid=activity-tag-{id}). Chip testids lower-case with spaces (cuisine-filter-cocktails, cuisine-filter-wine, cuisine-filter-breakfast). Backend URL: https://lucky-bite-1.preview.emergentagent.com. /api/spin is POST not GET; /api/places/photo requires 'name' query param (not 'ref').
